name: $200 Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons celery seed or ground celery seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salt, dry mustard, paprika, celery seed (or ground celery seed), sugar, vinegar, and Mazola oil in the top of a double boiler.
2. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Place the double boiler over a bowl of warm water, ensuring that it is just off the cold but not too hot (less than blood warmth).
4. Stir continuously with your fingers until the mixture reaches the desired temperature.
5. Remove the double boiler from the heat and beat the mixture vigorously with an egg beater until thickened.
6. Transfer the dressing to a bottle and store in the refrigerator.
7. Shake well before using, as it will not thicken if allowed to warm up too much.
